creator: tcole@nietzsche.nihilist.org
text:
The release date for FreeBSD 4.1 is incorrectly listed on:
http://www.freebsd.org/releases/

The page reads like this:

Current Release(s)

Release 4.1 (March, 2000) Announcement : Release Notes : Errata

That should obviously say July, 2000.

Fix: 

s/March/July
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at http://www.freebsd.org/releases/ :)
